remarks: Now offering 1 MONTH FREE with a one-year lease a significant savings opportunity on an already exceptional value. Rarely does an in-town rental of this size and floorplan become available. Excellent commuter location-just a seven-minute walk to the Metro-North train and a three-minute drive. This expansive, 1477 sq ft, two-bedroom duplex occupies the 3rd and 4th floors at The Wilton Center Lofts, offering a unique opportunity for modern, elevated living with private decks on both levels.  This brand-new, thoughtfully designed 1,477-square-foot residence blends style, comfort, and convenience. Architecturally and interior designed by the award-winning Granoff Architects, the home features top-tier finishes and timeless design throughout. The apartment boasts 9-foot ceilings and oversized, light-filled windows that create a bright and open atmosphere. The gourmet kitchen is equipped with quartz countertops, stainless steel BOSCH appliances, custom cabinetry, and premium fixtures. Wood-grain flooring flows throughout, complementing the luxurious bathrooms, while large walk-in closets, an in-unit washer and dryer, and a private deck provide everyday comfort and convenience. Residents enjoy access to a fitness center, tenant lounge, covered parking, and available storage units, further enhancing the lifestyle experience. Furry friends are welcome. This exceptional duplex delivers modern luxury, with an intelligent design.
